qualificationType: National Certificate: Hairdressing (NQF Level 2–3) / FET Certificate (Level 4), QCTO
duration: 2 years full-time study plus one year training in a salon. Each level (L2, L3, L4) must be completed before commencing the next.
admissionRequirement: Grade 9–12. Minimum age 16. Not funded by NSFAS.

curriculum.note: Career opportunities: hair stylist, salon owner, cruise-line work, TV/theatre hair technician, sales representative for hair-care product manufacturers.
